arguments.argument:
playSound(global.snd_LightballSpread,0,1,17000) playSound(global.snd_Shock,0,0.88,17000) var tNewInvert; tNewInvert=instance_create(0,0,oScreenInvert); tNewInvert.invertTime=6 var tEffect,tScl,tEfCir; for(i=0;i<24;i+=1) { tScl=0.35+random(0.25) tEffect=instance_create(x+random_range(-2,2),y+random_range(-2,2),oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfLinkLightning; tEffect.image_speed=0.25; tEffect.image_angle=random(360) tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0 tEffect.image_xscale=tScl; tEffect.image_yscale=tScl }
tEfCir=instance_create(x,y,oEfCircleBlast) tEfCir.image_alpha=0.7; tEfCir.myRad=8; tEfCir.radScl=8; tEfCir.fadeSpeed=0.1
